states.name: Rei
states.title: Sakura Bride
states.description: After countless centuries spent in a gloomy magical realm, Rei finds herself dazzled. The bright light filling the church, the sparkling raindrops scattered over cherry blossoms, the perfectly clear blue sky—it's almost too much. But it is all meant to celebrate her, and before she knows it, she has stopped in the middle of the aisle, overwhelmed with emotion.

states.name: Rei
states.title: Sakura Bride
states.description:
There are unexpected, familiar faces among the guests, and Rei's eyes go wide in surprise. The bikki from Kisenkyo have come, and they are calling out to her from the distance, not a hint of strain in their smiles.
"You look so beautiful, Sage Rei!"
It feels as if her past sin and their years of resentment all have vanished, just for today. As Rei waves back at them, her eyes well up with tears.

states.name: Rei
states.title: Sakura Bride
states.description:
"It is customary to sleep together after the ceremony, isn't it?" Rei says as she climbs into bed, her cheeks flushed from all the alcohol she's drunk during the celebrations, her breath a little uneven. However, she is fast asleep the minute her head touches the pillow.
For centuries, that was all that she's wanted—someone who would sleep by her side. As the Sleeping Beauty dreams, a peaceful smile appears on her face.
